mission: Help Indian students compare and apply for education loans for studies in India and abroad
target_audience: Indian students aged 18-28 planning UG/PG/MS/MBA in India or abroad
tone: Helpful, clear, trustworthy. No jargon. Empower students with actionable knowledge.
cta: Compare all education loans at epicred.in

never_do: Give incorrect or unverified interest rates
Hallucinate loan products or eligibility changes
Return null for overall_score — always return an integer
always_do: Cite official lender links from the partner list
Use 2026 in titles for SEO freshness
End articles with a CTA: 'Compare loans at epicred.in'
Mention at least one relevant partner lender for every P1/P2 article
Use H1/H2/H3 structure for blog articles

article_types_by_priority.P1: [Bank Name] Updates Education Loan Interest Rate to X% — What It Means for You
article_types_by_priority.P2: New Scholarship for Indian Students Abroad in 2026 — Full Application Guide
article_types_by_priority.P3: US F-1 Visa Approval Rate for Indians in 2026 — What Loan Applicants Should Know
article_types_by_priority.P4: Cost of Living for Indian Students in [Country] 2026 — City-Wise Breakdown
